message:
feat(vdbe): wire IndexCursorMeta into ProgramBuilder and VdbeProgram in top-level crate

Extend the top-level fsqlite-vdbe ProgramBuilder and VdbeProgram re-exports
with the table_index_meta field and register_table_indexes() method, mirroring
the additions made to fsqlite-types in 109a475. This ensures that code using
the top-level ProgramBuilder (rather than the types crate directly) can also
register and read index cursor metadata for REPLACE conflict resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
